name: Week 5 Push — Shuffle (Chest/Shoulders/Triceps)
description: Shuffle week: reordered exercises to get honest numbers on lifts that have been dying at the end. Push press moves to station 1 (before chest fatigue) to test true overhead capacity. Chest press machine stays as main chest exercise. Based on W4 actuals.

exercises.notes: Warm up the chest, get blood flowing

SHUFFLE: moved first — fresh shoulders, no chest pre-fatigue. W4 actuals: 50/side couldn't go overhead (done after chest work), 45/side got 5/6/5. Try 50/side again here. If 50 goes up clean, that confirms the W4 ceiling was fatigue, not strength.
W4 actuals: 15x15 too easy. Try 20s if available. Otherwise 15s with slow eccentric or 5 sets with drop set.
W4 actuals: 175x6/8/8, 185x4, 180x3. Working weight 175. Try 180 for all sets — if 180x6+ is clean, push to 185 on last set. Keep handles forward, not behind back.
W4 actuals: 55x10/10/10(hard)/9. Push for clean 4x10 at 55 before going up. This is an honest 4x10 check — chest press came first now so incline may feel slightly harder.

sets.name: Station 3: Pec Deck + Cable Lat Raise + Triceps

exercises.notes: W4 actuals: 105x12, 105x12, 115x9 (failure). Start at 110, try 115 on set 2-3. Goal: 115x10+.
W4 actuals: 50x12/12, 65x6 then 55x4. Working weight 50, try 55 for all sets. 65 remains stretch goal.
W4 actuals: 55x12 (easy), 65x10, 65x12 (form breaking). Working weight 65, try 70 if 65 feels clean. Keep hands apart.
W4 actuals: 70/90/105 all x12, all too easy. Start at 110+. If 110x12 is easy, jump to 120. Pull exercise as push day finisher — lats are fresh.

tips: SHUFFLE WEEK: Push press is first exercise. This tests whether W4's 50/side ceiling was fatigue or actual strength limit.
If 50/side push press goes up clean here, future weeks can keep it early OR rotate position.
Chest press at 180: handles forward, not behind back. Shoulder-safe start position.
Incline DB at 55: moved after chest press now — note if the order change affects reps.
Pec deck: 110 start, push to 115. Cable lat raise: 55 target, 65 stretch.
Tricep extension: 65 working, try 70. Straight arm pulldown: start at 110+.
